name: icdt-skills
description: A 12-skill depth pack for ICDT (International Conference on Database Theory), the European database-theory venue co-located with EDBT and published open-access in LIPIcs (Schloss Dagstuhl): venue routing against PODS, the two-submission-round calendar with a first-cycle revision option, anonymous submission via Microsoft CMT, the lipics-v2021 15-page format with a complete-proofs appendix and archived full version, theorem-proof writing rigor, and LIPIcs camera-ready production. Grounded in the ICDT 2026/2027 databasetheory.org calls, the EDBT/ICDT 2026 and 2027 sites, DROPS/LIPIcs, and dblp checked on 2026-07-09.
